description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily white with large, rectangular windows, including a prominent bay window on the upper floor. The house features a driveway leading to a garage, a small front yard with green grass, and a paved walkway. The upper floor includes a balcony with metal railings and a spacious terrace area. The main entryway is set back, accessible via a short set of steps, and is flanked by large windows. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roof, large windows, a garage, balcony, and a spacious terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, bay windows, and front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terrace, balcony, and the rear portion of the house with additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the terrace, balcony, and upper floor windows, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and side windows, with the front yard partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and rectangular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, flanked by large windows, and a simple, modern door
